name: Rivet
description: Rivet — Open-source game server hosting platform with matchmaking, lobbies, and autoscaling on managed infrastructure.

seo.title: Rivet — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Rivet: Rivet — Open-source game server hosting platform with matchmaking, lobbies, and autoscaling on managed infrastructure.

when_to_use: Open-source game server hosting with matchmaking and lobbies
Autoscaling dedicated game servers on managed infrastructure
Self-hosted alternative to Hathora for game server needs
Player-facing game sessions with global latency routing
Transparent game server platform without proprietary lock-in

cons: Feature depth lags Nakama or PlayFab
review.verdict: Promising open-source game server platform, but early enough that Nakama is usually a safer bet.
review.best_for: Indie studios wanting open-source game hosting with matchmaking and lobbies built in
review.not_for: Teams needing battle-tested infrastructure or deep live-ops tooling

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with free tier; no peak-lock evidence
